narrative:
Precinct Greenwich Village (precinct in Huron County) has 830 registered voters, with 58.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
